title: DTU RAVEN Receives Equipment Support from UXV Technologies
excerpt: UXV Technologies provided DTU RAVEN with advanced equipment to aid in their projects.
content:
We're incredibly grateful to Steven and UXV Technologies for their generous support! They have provided us with a state-of-the-art SRoC 7" Android ground control station, along with two swappable radio modules that integrate seamlessly with our drone—plus additional components to help push our project forward.

Strong industry collaborations like this are invaluable, and we're always looking to connect with companies and individuals who want to show us cool tech, exchange knowledge, or explore potential partnerships. If that sounds like you, let's talk!
